name: Uptime Kuma
compose:
name: slashnode-uptime-kuma
services:
  server:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:2.4.0
    container_name: uptime-kuma
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - server_data-uptime-kuma:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8385:3001
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-uptime-kuma:
    name: slashnode-uptime-kuma_server_data-uptime-kuma
